title: Mandatory Publishing, Returns, Alternate Exchanges, and Route Audits · Compiler Case: Unroutable Failure Policy
summary: The service publishes with mandatory false, treats confirms as proof of routing, attaches the return listener after publishing, and retries unroutable messages forever without fixing topology. Planned artifact: Add and verify the unroutable failure policy increment in unroutable publication detection and ownership record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Classify unroutable messages as contract, deployment, tenant, or malicious failures and choose alert, quarantine, reject, or repair ownership.
Build topology fixtures that assert expected destination sets, forbidden routes, unroutable cases, permissions, and changed bindings.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Predict Unroutable Failure Policy · Theory Unroutable Failure Policy
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory messaging team handles case 6868 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to keep mandatory return, alternate custody, confirmation, and route uncertainty separate; show recovery after the changed failure is removed; then remove the dead-letter binding and expose the resulting retention risk. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Unroutable Failure Policy contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Predict Unroutable Failure Policy · Theory Unroutable Failure Policy.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for classify unroutable messages as contract, deployment, tenant, or malicious failures and choose alert, quarantine, reject, or repair ownership. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Predict Unroutable Failure Policy · Theory Unroutable Failure Policy, keep Unroutable Failure Policy connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.
